query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTime,
       awaySpread, homeSpread, awaySpreadOdds, homeSpreadOdds,
       bookTotal, overOdds, underOdds,
       awayML, homeML,
       openAwaySpread, openHomeSpread, openTotal
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-26'
ORDER BY startTime ASC;
